03 · What We Build

From idea to a product you can sell

B2B SaaS platforms

Multi-tenant, RBAC, audit — production-grade from day one.

AI & LLM features

Extraction, RAG copilots, forecasting, vision — with cost control.

Billing & monetization

Subscriptions, per-seat, usage metering, invoicing & dunning.

Dashboards & analytics

Reporting, exports & decision-grade insight for operators.

Mobile apps

React Native / Expo field & consumer apps.

Integrations & APIs

Webhooks, OAuth connectors, import/export & MCP.

04 · The Stack

One proven, production stack

Client — web dashboards, mobile-friendly views & native apps
Next.js / ReactTypeScriptReact Native
API & platform core — high-performance REST in Go, RBAC, tenancy, audit
Go (Golang)ChiJWT + API keys
AI services — extraction, RAG, forecasting, vision — durable orchestration
Temporal workflowsVision / Document AILLM Gateway
Monetization & data/infra — metered billing · Postgres · object storage · observability
StripeDunningPostgreSQLRedis
DevzStudiodevzstudio.com

05 · Production Building Blocks

Battle-tested patterns — not rebuilt each time

  • Multi-tenant orgs + RBAC · in production
  • Auth — API keys, JWT/JWKS, SSO · in production
  • Billing — subscriptions, invoicing, dunning · in production
  • Usage metering & limit enforcement · in production
  • Immutable audit / event log · in production
  • Webhooks + automation rules engine · in production
  • Document upload & parse pipeline · in production
  • Temporal-orchestrated AI / LLM layer · in production

Reusing proven blocks → a de-risked build with predictable timelines.

DevzStudiodevzstudio.com

06 · How We Engineer

Quality is the default

Product thinking

We design for the business model — pricing, limits & margins, not just features.

Secure by default

Input validation, parameterised queries, HttpOnly sessions, OWASP-aligned reviews.

Real AI / LLM ops

RAG, document AI & cost-controlled multi-model gateways in production.

Scale-ready

No N+1 queries, eager loading, observability & load-tested release gates.

DevzStudiodevzstudio.com

07 · How We Engage

De-risked, milestone-linked delivery

1

Paid Discovery

Locked architecture, data & security model, a clickable prototype and a fixed quote — credited to the build.

2

Milestone fixed-bid

Payment-linked milestones with clear deliverables — no open-ended billing.

3

Phased delivery

Each phase is a real, shippable release with its own ROI — demo, sell, iterate.

4

Managed Care

Support, maintenance & hosting as one fully-managed monthly plan.
